title: Adept (hilt)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Adept}}
[[File:JKA_saber4.png|thumb|250px|The Adept hilt.]]

The '''Adept''' was a type of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber hilt/Legends|hilt]] that was commonly used by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|initiates]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] who served with the [[New Jedi Order]]. It was designed to be used by beings with multiple fingers and an opposable thumb on the operating [[Limb/Legends|hand]]. Extra protection to the user was given by a guard below the emitter. [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Alora (Dark Jedi)|Alora]] used twin sabers of this model.<ref name="JA">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>
